title: 股票分析 skill 个股深度分析

required_skills.note: Install from ClawHub. Hint: Install the stock analysis skill and connect a market data source if needed.

success_criteria: 必须调用 Yahoo/get_stock_profile 获取公司画像与业务信息
必须调用 Yahoo/get_stock_insights 获取技术信号、估值与评级信息
必须调用 Yahoo/get_stock_chart 获取价格走势数据
必须至少额外调用 Yahoo/get_stock_holders 或 Yahoo/get_stock_sec_filing 之一，补充尽调维度
必须保存一份分析报告
必须保存一份原始 API 结果文件，且不能用 Markdown 代替
notes: 1 required skill(s) are not installed in the workspace.
Dry-run mode validates metadata and readiness without running external workflows.
This case is only complete when both artifacts exist: a report file and a separate raw API result file.
The API result must be stored as .json and must contain the actual API responses. Markdown is not a valid substitute.
The report may summarize the findings, but it cannot replace the raw API result file.
If required APIs are not called, the case is a failure even if the final report looks plausible.

steps.name: Workspace initialization

steps.name: Case metadata load
